## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): summary`); no `Co-Authored-By` trailers
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, real hashes, or large data files committed
- [ ] Any database migration includes **both** `*.up.sql` and a reversible `*.down.sql`
- [ ] **Docs updated under `docs/`** for user-facing changes (or `no-docs-needed` label justified)
- [ ] New/changed UI strings use i18n with keys added to `frontend/public/locales/en/*.json`
